---
title: "Payroll Anomaly Ranking"
listing:
  contents:
    - "01_problem_framing_and_data_maturity.ipynb"
    - "02_feature_engineering_and_baselines.ipynb"
    - "03_modeling_evaluation_and_error_analysis.ipynb"
    - "04_review_queue_explainability_and_thresholds.ipynb"
    - "05_production_monitoring_and_deployment_path.ipynb"
    - "06_internal_statistical_diagnostics.ipynb"
    - "07_simulation_and_stress_testing.ipynb"
    - "08_snf_payroll_approval_case_studies.ipynb"
    - "09_model_ablation_and_ml_value.ipynb"
    - "payroll_anomaly_detection.ipynb"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: false
  fields: [title, date, date-modified, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: "medium"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
date-modified: ""
---

Selected notebooks from the `payroll-anomaly-ranking` project.
